data.title: VITAS Healthcare named a 2025 Top Workplace in Healthcare by Top Workplaces USA for exceptional employee feedback. #Miramar #Hospice.
data.description: VITAS Healthcare, the top provider of end-of-life care in the US, was recognized as a 2025 Top Workplace in Healthcare by Top Workplaces USA. This national accolade is based on employee feedback, highlighting VITAS' exceptional work environment. With this honor, VITAS joins an elite group of organizations distinguished for their commitment to staff satisfaction. This recognition underscores VITAS' dedication to fostering a positive workplace culture.

data.title: America's soybean exports to China plummeted to zero in May after China implemented retaliatory tariffs due to Trump's levies.
data.description: In May, China ceased purchasing soybeans from the U.S. as a retaliatory measure against President Trump's decision to raise tariffs on Chinese goods. This move affected a substantial amount of soybean trade between the two countries, with millions of dollars' worth of the crop no longer being exported from the U.S. to China.

data.title: USA Gymnastics extends partnership with AAI as Official Equipment Supplier for Artistic Gymnastics Program until 2029.
data.description: USA Gymnastics recently confirmed that American Athletic, Inc. (AAI) has extended its partnership as the Official Gymnastics Equipment Supplier for the USA Gymnastics Artistic Development Program until 2029. This collaboration, announced in September 2025, marks a significant milestone in the long-standing relationship between the two organizations. AAI, known for its high-quality gymnastics equipment, has been a key partner of USA Gymnastics for many years. This partnership extension underscores the commitment of both parties to support the development of elite gymnasts in the country.

data.title: Susan G. Komen® MORE THAN PINK Walk is back in Georgia, aiming to raise $805K for breast cancer mission, uniting survivors and supporters in 2025.
data.description: In Atlanta, Susan G. Komen®, the top breast cancer organization globally, will gather breast cancer survivors, metastatic breast cancer (MBC) patients, and supporters at the 2025 Georgia MORE THAN PINK Walk. This event serves to unite the community and secure funds for Komen's mission. The goal is set to raise $805,000 at the walk to support Komen's vital work nationwide, including...

data.title: Inventor from Canada creates CARPET CUP for vehicle carpet cleaning, promising deep clean. (TRO-1414)
data.description: In Pittsburgh on September 25, 2025, a Canadian inventor from Prince Williams, NB shared the inspiration behind the CARPET CUP innovation. The inventor believed in a more effective method for deep cleaning vehicle carpets, leading to the creation of the CARPET CUP. This innovative design aims to enhance the cleanliness and visual appeal of vehicle carpets.

data.title: 5WPR chosen as Agency of Record for Yourgi, Inc., a pet services marketplace, on Sept. 25, 2025.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, in New York City, 5WPR, a leading independently owned integrated communications agency, revealed that it has been selected as the Agency of Record for Yourgi, Inc. Yourgi is a pet services marketplace that focuses on assisting pet owners in connecting with reputable local service providers.

data.title: JumpCloud launches Asset Management to simplify IT asset tracking, management, and reporting for organizations, replacing manual methods.
data.description: In a recent announcement on September 25, 2025, in Louisville, Colorado, tech company JumpCloud Inc. introduced the release of JumpCloud Asset Management. This innovative solution offers IT departments a straightforward method to automatically monitor, control, and generate reports on all IT assets. This development enables organizations to streamline beyond cumbersome manual spreadsheets and efficiently manage their IT resources.

data.title: Eesti Energia withdraws BB+ rating from S&P on 25 Sept 2025, with no impact on financials or obligations.
data.description: Eesti Energia withdrew its long-term issuer credit rating from S&P Global Ratings on September 25, 2025. The rating at the time of withdrawal was BB+ with a negative outlook. This withdrawal does not impact the company's financial standing, current operations, or commitments to investors and stakeholders.

data.title: IPv4.Global relaunches ProVision platform, backed by Hilco Global. Platform simplifies critical infrastructure for enterprises, service providers.
data.description: On September 25, 2025, a leading company, IPv4.Global, under Hilco Global's Capital Solutions division, unveiled the reimagined ProVision platform. This advanced network automation tool is highly reliable among enterprises and service providers for streamlining and expanding essential infrastructure.
